name: IOSoccer
description: IOSoccer is a free non-commercial competitive third-person online multiplayer soccer game that offers unparalleled freedom in ball control and gameplay depth.

name: AirMech
description: AirMech® Strike is a fast paced Action-RTS game that can be played solo, coop, or competitively online. Earn Kudos and Experience in battle and unlock a wide collection of AirMechs and Units while you practice the perfect strategy to emerge victorious!

name: MICROVOLTS: Recharged
description: Microvolts Recharged is a quirky lobby-based third-person shooter with a unique toy theme. The game features a fun character cast and freely swappable 7 weapon types. Battle it out across dozens of large well-designed maps and frag your enemies!
notes: Có DLC trả phí; Easy Anti-Cheat [Kernel]

name: Idol Party
description: “WOW,you can really dance!” Welcome to IDOL PARTY. Immerse yourself in dance and song to find friends in this social game. Charm your love with moves and melodies, pledge togetherness, marry, and start a family. Tired? Farm or play mini-games for endless fun!

name: Mini World: CREATA
description: Mini World is a 3D free sandbox game about adventure, exploration, and creating your dream worlds. There is no grinding or leveling up. No IAP gate that locks features from free to play players. Everyone can enjoy the game’s full features with great freedom

name: Thunder Tier One
description: Thunder Tier One is a realistic top-down shooter where you join an elite special operations team tasked with stopping a dangerous terrorist organization wreaking havoc across the fictional Eastern European country of Salobia.

name: Pixel Strike 3D
description: Pixel Strike 3D is a Multiplayer First-Person Shooter that features fast-paced gameplay and a wide variety of player customization. Battle friends and foes from all around the world in over 20 unique game modes, with over 70 available weapons.

name: Deducto
description: A fun hidden role game where you backstab your co-workers and get mad at your co-workers for backstabbing you. (6-10 players)

name: Wheelchair Wizards
description: Wheelchair Wizards is a 4 player party game where you battle your friends while upgrading your wizard.

name: Mitos.is: The Game
description: Step into the microscopic world of Mitos.is! Eat or be eaten—become the ultimate cell in a highly addictive multiplayer game. Diverse modes, daily tournaments, guilds, and gear await! The BEST game of 2015 is back!

name: Nexus Rumble: The Ultimate Showdown
description: Welcome to Nexus Rumble, the ultimate showdown where champions clash in a fierce competition for survival! Prepare to embark on an adrenaline-fueled journey through diverse landscapes and exhilarating challenges in this heart-pounding multiplayer extravaganza.

name: The Fishing Club 3D: Co-op Sport Angling
description: Go fishing and relax. Craft baits, catch legendary fish and complete your catch album - or take part in epic fishing competitions against other anglers or fishing clubs. Create or join a fishing club and chat with fellow anglers in the in-game chat. Play now for free! Tight lines!

name: Drag Racing 3D: Streets 2
description: A one-of-a-kind drag racing game. Sprint duels that will determine the greatest racer of all time.Think your car can win? Show it!

name: King of Crabs
description: Battle Royale with crabs! Intense multiplayer action, with up to 100 players! Scrap, scavenge and slaughter your way to becoming the King of Crabs!

name: Ylands
description: Adventure awaits you and your friends in the world of Ylands! Gather resources, craft tools, construct anything and everything, and explore the lands! Build a ship and set sail, encountering mythical animals, a wide variety of sea-life, enemies of all kinds and much more!

name: Summoners War: RUSH
description: Summoners War: Rush is an idle tower defense RPG where you collect and strengthen your Monsters to build a team and defeat waves of enemies! Fight increasingly powerful foes across Stage Mode and Tower Defense Mode. Build your ultimate team and dominate every challenge!

name: lure
description: To make some money from an old man, you are asked to fish at the forbidden Shinto shrine.

name: Almost My Floor: Prologue
description: A Prologue to Almost My Floor, an upcoming horror-themed point'n'click adventure. Alex is a real fan of creepy stuff and horror movies, but he never expected to experience it himself just by taking the elevator back home! Can he avoid the madness and deal with the evil he's up against?

name: South Scrimshaw, Part One
description: South Scrimshaw is the story of a newborn whale in a vast alien ocean. It is a richly illustrated experimental visual novel, written in the style of a nature documentary.

name: The Flood
description: The Flood is a peaceful 5 minute narrative experience in which you pilot a little boat down a river. It's a gentle reminder that sometimes we should stop worrying about our destination and just enjoy the journey.

name: You're Not Family
description: A (really short) free narrative rhythm game by Atiya Nova. Attend family dinners and time your key presses to the flow of conversation. Features lots of familial tension with a dash of misery. And cute bunnies!

name: Forgetmenots
description: Step onto the stage in Forgetmenots, a story-driven puzzle adventure where memories take center stage. Explore a theatrical world that unfolds like a live performance, solving puzzles in a whimsical yet bittersweet journey about loss and remembrance.

name: Ex Vitro
description: EX VITRO is a dark sci-fi 2D platformer where you delve into the ruins of a military research facility and discover the horrors within. Whether machine, creature, or something else entirely, you’ll face the violent legacy of the last survivors of humanity.

name: Lightless
description: Lightless: The 21st Sacrifice is the first episode of an atmospheric horror game series set in 2018 Iran, Saqqez that tells the story of Navid, a writer who finally comes home, only to find himself strangled by a dark past that will not let go.

name: Gordian Rooms: A curious heritage Prologue
description: Gordian Rooms: A Curious Heritage is a Victorian escape game, where you solve various puzzles in your late uncle’s mansion in the hope of obtaining his legacy. In the prologue you can play through the first level of the game.

name: Of Moons and Mania
description: Of Moons and Mania is an interactive psychotic break, based on lived experience. It uses elements of its design to explain the struggles of psychosis, and tells a personal story about mental illness.

name: Last Broadcast
description: An experimental narrative game set at a radio station at the end of the world. Host your last show as the sun turns red and the world burns down.

name: TRAFFIC
description: TRAFFIC is an Atmospheric First-Person Psychological Horror game about a troubled child in a home where he must deal with both internal and external stresses. You will communicate with your parents, do your chores, and stay out of the way.

name: Sixth Extinction
description: Sixth extinction is a dark, narrative-driven experience about extinction and discovering the true nature of yourself. Can you outwit the obstacles in your way, uncover the truth and begin a change?

name: The Picture of Café au lait
description: The picture of café au lait is a visual novel game that makes the players feel immersed in story and character. They will experience the story in the game through the first-person perspective of the main character in the story named "Takagi".

name: Lilith Wants to Buy Your Soul
description: Take a personality test with a definitely-not-clingy demon girl.

name: Escape to Moscow
description: A story about a guy, a girl he met, and their adventure. Freelance IT specialist Semyon meet a girl from Dagestan on the Internet. However, their relationship quickly grow over the regular chatting - he decides to help her run away from home. That is how their amazing adventure begins.

name: Deliver Us From Evil (DUFE)
description: Romance supernatural bachelors and investigate humanity’s dark wishes!

name: The Winter Tower
description: Will Ekaterina be able to safely complete her coming-of-age ceremony and emerge as the rightful successor to the House?

name: Furry Shakespeare: Dashing Dinosaurs & Sexy Centaurs: Winter's Tale
description: Do you like sappy holiday movies? Well, now you're in one. Save the day with your band of holiday elves.

name: Slappyball
description: It's hands playing volleyball. Compete online and show who has the better ball handling skills. Style on your opponents through skill and a superior fashion sense.

name: Professional Fishing
description: Are you falling asleep with a rod? Never again! Professional Fishing will never let you fall asleep! Play an amazing fishing simulator and feel like a real angler! Create your own fishing club and compete with others!

name: Romans: Age of Caesar
description: Build Rome Together! A co-operative grand strategy MMO from a team of veteran city builders, Romans: Age of Caesar is the latest historical strategy game from Firefly Studios.

name: Blackwake
description: Blackwake is a multiplayer naval FPS focused on teamwork and cooperation. Fire the cannons, sink enemy ships or board them with firearms and steel.

name: CS2D
description: CS2D is a free fast-paced top-down multiplayer shooter. Featuring many different game modes, a built-in map editor and much more.

name: E.T.E
description: The 3D anime-style shooting game "E.T.E" is launching early access soon. It offers three unique environments—sea, land, and air—plus a system for developing female characters and mechas. Famous voice actresses like Sakura Tange, Kana Hanazawa, Rie Tanaka, and Mikako Komatsu voice the characters.

name: Uptasia
description: Discover Uptasia! Create your own little 19th century town with fantastic production sites and shops. Master a wide variety of hidden object game challenges. Put your reactions and strategic skill to the test. Download Uptasia now!

name: Kingdom Heroes M
description: 歷經20年的感動，給你最原汁原味的《三國群英傳M》

name: RPG MO
description: RPG MO is a nostalgic MMORPG that reminds of Ultima and Runescape Classic.

name: Argentum Online
description: Argentum Online, a 2D MMORPG, offers epic quests, dungeon delves, and battles in a fantasy world. Emphasizing community, it features alliances, PvP, and a player-driven economy, all within a vibrant open-world setting.
notes: Có DLC trả phí; VAC (Valve Anti-Cheat) [Kernel]

name: War Rock
description: War Rock is a fast-paced, large-scale multiplayer first person shooter that combines old-school tactical combat with explosive vehicular warfare. Choose your profession and battle in close quarters combat, vehicular warfare and terrifying Zombie Survival encounters. Enlist in War Rock today!

name: Stormgate
description: Stormgate is a free-to-play real-time strategy game with a full single-player campaign, 3-player co-op, and PvP versus modes on over 60 maps. Our Editor is also freely available for you to craft just about any custom game mode you can imagine. Join our development journey today!
notes: Có DLC trả phí; Easy Anti-Cheat [Kernel]

name: Dead Maze
description: Dead Maze is a 2D MMO game set in a destroyed contemporary world, filled with zombies. Explore the world, scavenge and craft as many items as possible, to survive the hostile environment and upgrade your gear and camp as you go.

name: Warborne Above Ashes
description: Warborne is a top-down PvP loot-and-extract MMO. Every choice in the Abyss is a high-stakes gamble. Pick your gear wisely, employ cunning tactics, and plunder every treasure you can from a battlefield teeming with deception. And pray you make it out alive. Trade your spoils to grow your might.

name: Paint Warfare
description: A fast-paced online arena FPS with jetpacks, hang gliders, fast respawns, 6-minute rounds and instant matches

name: Growtopia
description: Growtopia is a 2D sandbox game, that brings together millions of players in an expansive pixel world. Collaborate in building anything you can imagine, become anyone you want to be, and delve into numerous mini-games. Unleash your creativity and join the massive universe in Growtopia today!

name: Anomaly Zone
description: Anomaly Zone is an open world MMORPG and a post-apocalyptic shooter. Be a scientist, a soldier, a hunter or an engineer. Explore anomalous territories, search for artifacts, fight mutants and other players. Participate in mass PvP and PvE battles. The Zone is waiting!

name: MindMindMind
description: A dark, psychological romance VN about a British ghost who has haunted you since childhood. When you get close to a new boy at college, he starts to get possessive, and the mind games begin!

name: My Therapy
description: A visual novel about cute melancholic girls!

name: Wheel of Innocence
description: Wheel of Innocence is a lesbian visual novel where you peer into the life of a disabled high schooler named Reina.

name: PROJECT: Halloween
description: She was created for one purpose: to make sure everyone in the world enjoys Halloween. At all costs. A short, fully-voiced horror visual novel exploring instrumental convergence.

name: PIGBLUE
description: A stranger arrives at a quiet and isolated town... PIGBLUE.

name: Fantastic Dream
description: I dreamed of a girl. From then on, I saw her every day in my dreams. I don't know why it happened. I can only keep telling myself that it is all false, all illusion. But on the other hand, I fell in love with it.

name: 飄流幻境M
description: "Wonderland M" is a turn-based MMORPG with ancient civilizations, cute characters, and exploration. Pilot vehicles, meet characters, recruit companions, and create your dream home. Compose your own legendary adventure in "Wonderland M"!

name: M.A.R.S.
description: MARS is a Free-To-Play Third Person Shooter set in an evolving sci-fi world. From the hilarious Headhunter mode, to Huge Mecha vs Mecha battles, to fully customizable loadouts; whether Co-op or PvP, M.A.R.S. has something for everyone. Kill, Die, Repeat.
notes: Có DLC trả phí; Easy Anti-Cheat [Non-Kernel]

name: The Genesis Project
description: The Genesis Project is an attempt to replicate Sburb from the popular webcomic Homestuck, made by Andrew Hussie.

name: Lost Lives
description: Lost Lives is a multiplayer 2D shooter with RPG elements, in which you will find yourself in the conditions of post-Soviet devastation. As you play, you will have to fight other players and local factions, as well as find and sell loot. Choose your equipment wisely and defeat your enemies!

name: GPRO - Classic racing manager
description: Manage your racing team, driver and a car, prepare setups and strategy for every race, plan your season and budget, analyze race telemetry.

name: Prison Life
description: An online game that you'll play with 3-11 players as a Prisoner or a Guard and will try to escape or prevent escapes. Loot, Craft, and make your way to the exit, or investigate and arrest wanted players as a guard!

name: Bombix
description: Do you like shooting? Then arm yourself - the world of Bombix awaits you! You will find yourself in the shoes of a small but VERY dangerous fighter, gather together a team of thugs and show 'em all how to fight!

name: Zombie Panic! Source
description: Dive into the zombie apocalypse with Zombie Panic! Source: a cooperative, survival-horror first-person-shooter. A fast-paced standalone modification.

name: XERA: Survival
description: Action-focused, open world survival shooter, PvPvE against fellow mercenaries and lethal XOIDS. Raid for resources alone or with team-mates, build and defend your base, stash your gear and survive against the odds. You are the hunters. You are the hunted. And the robots never sleep…

name: DK Online
description: DK Online, a fantasy-themed classic MMORPG, invites you to combat monsters, engage in intense PvP, and prove your skills by leveling up. You can magically transform your look into stylish characters. Conquer achievements and explore a vast world as a Dragon Knight. Massive rewards await you!

name: Global Football
description: Global Football is a multiplayer football game focused on real skill, teamwork, and identity. Here, each player controls a single athlete on the field — not an entire team. No pay-to-win. No scripts. Victory depends solely on your game awareness, technique, and team chemistry.

name: Tank POV
description: You play as a little tank in a psychological horror game set in a bizarre world where tanks can devour each other, and are even treated as meat. Grilled, cooked, and served like ordinary food.

name: Aetherbreak
description: In this fast-paced, 3D first-person platformer, soar through the air as Velos, an angel attempting to prove his worth and break free from the aether by overcoming a gauntlet of challenges. Players speed across platforms, navigating obstacles as quickly as possible in order to escape purgatory.

name: Unanswered
description: You wake up in a strange place, not knowing who you are, where you are, or how you got here. Trapped in an environment that twists to break your sanity, your only way out is to delve into the unknown and face the horrors of a past your mind is trying to hide.

name: Anomaly Jobs : Data Center
description: You work the nightshift at Data Center DC4-31. Something is off this time. Spot the anomaly, take the correct exit multiple times in a row and finish your shift.

name: 液态围棋
description: What if in a Weiqi (Go) game stones lose their solid shapes and could be placed anywhere? Do those classic josekis still hold up? How do you make an eye? Is it easier/more difficult to attack/defend? This game satisfies all your curiosity. Try out Fluid Weiqi and experience Weiqi like never before!

name: 焚天烈火之元素领主
description: 经典传奇3的1:1原味复刻，战法道三职业重聚！完美还原当年数值、全部地图与玩法——绿玉裁决、神舰跑船、多技能体系、强元素体系悉数归来。同时重磅加入境界、铭文等全新养成系统，以及跨服战场、神秘新地图。老情怀与新体验碰撞，焕新出发！

name: 帝王霸业
description: 耐玩性佳：无套路、无强制消费 耐玩性佳：海量特色玩法持续更新，长久陪伴乐趣无穷！ 匠心巨制：团队潜心一年重磅打造，热血体验诚意奉上！ 人气保障：专注打造火爆大服，激情永不落幕！

name: Ark: The Shadow Of Terra
description: 欢迎来到罗德岛。作为博士的你刚刚从石棺中醒来，然而身边的一切都是陌生的，但直觉告诉你，你所遇到的一切都正在被“侵蚀”。而作为博士的你，又该如何抉择呢？

name: The Azure One
description: Follow the young boy Qiuxu to meet the girl who always sprints in the sunshine, and get to know three other girls with distinct personalities. In the daily life of the Second Municipal High School, you will witness a youth that cannot be turned back — a story destined to go somewhere.

name: 王者争雄
description: 耗时两年!呕心沥血!诚意之作! 原创剧情+超级大陆+不肝不氪 上线即送:专属自动回收 自动拾取 自动经验 专属法师单职业+特色剧情自由探索，专属BUFF任意搭配，百玩不腻

name: 翻翻卡
description: 翻翻卡是一款动作竞技3D卡牌游戏 玩家将扮演各种角色与其他玩家或boss进行趣味对战 自由组建属于自己的卡组，自由匹配对战 每回合双放各8张随从总计16张随从卡随机分散在战斗区域内 双方玩家轮流扇卡，随从卡初始正面朝上，翻转或出界视为退场 不同的扇卡姿势，距离远近，随从技能，行动卡特效都会影响扇卡结果！ 最后保留至少一张卡的是赢家！ 赢者不止获胜，更可以永久抽走败方上阵卡组中的一张卡，收为自己的战利品！ 完全还原童年的紧张刺激，等你来玩！
developer: 上海万宿朝元网络科技有限公司
publisher: 上海万宿朝元网络科技有限公司

name: Age of Gods
description: A competitive turn-based strategy game where positioning, unit synergy, and map control decide everything. Capture structures, build your army, and outplay your opponents in tactical battles with up to 8 players.

name: Maelstrom
description: Maelstrom is a licensed open source port of the original shareware game for the Macintosh by Ambrosia Software, Inc. It is a fast-action, asteroids-like game, with classic pixel graphics and original sounds.

name: Aero Tales Online: The World - Anime MMORPG
description: Aero Tales Online is a free Cross-Platform Anime MMORPG with PvP, PvE, Fortress War, Faction War, Guild War, and life-sim features like Cooking, Farming, Fishing, Housing, Marriage, and even flying freely across the world. Uncover the mystery of the Key of Skylight and begin your adventure!

name: Ink Shadow: Zero
description: Ink Shadow: Zero​ - A martial-arts-themed RPG where you begin as a nameless novice and explore a world where light and shadow intertwine. From chance encounters to pivotal choices that reshape the balance of power, carve your own legend in the martial arts world

name: 次元战姬ol
description: 次世代都市异能3D卡牌RPG大作——200+美少女自由组合，炫酷大招引爆全场，全明星日本声优演绎，助你酣战未来都市!

name: Pulled Strings
description: Pulled Strings — a social deduction game with survival elements for 3–10 players. Among you hides a Maniac — your goal is not only to find them, but to survive. Keep the fireplace burning, cook okroshka, and stay out of the darkness.

name: Vahnora
description: Vahnora is a free-to-play 2D MMORPG with real-time combat, faction warfare, and a player-driven economy. Pick from 7 classes, capture relics across faction frontlines, climb the endless Infinity Tower, lay siege to the castle every Saturday, and forge your name into the leaderboards.

name: Portal Worlds
description: You crossed a portal to survive, but what will you become on the other side? Explore dangerous regions, recruit mecha maidens, craft gear, and fight endless waves of monsters and bosses in this epic Idle RPG. Play solo or with others, grow steadily, and see how strong you can become.

name: Rpg Rush
description: RPG Rush is a fast-paced dark fantasy card game where strategy meets chance. Build your deck, roll enchanted dice for mana, and outplay your opponent in intense 1v1 battles. We are on BETA and your feedback matters.

name: Snooker Blitz
description: Step into competitive online Snooker. Challenge global opponents in real-time 1v1 matches and tournaments where accurate physics and smooth controls reward smart shots and steady aim. Whether you’re a seasoned snooker player or new to the sport, the table is waiting for you!

name: Pool Blitz
description: Join millions of players online in the No.1 Cross Platform pool game! Experience stunning visuals, realistic physics, and fast-paced modes like 8-Ball, 9-Ball, and Blitz. Challenge friends, master trick shots, and climb the leaderboards - new to Steam!

name: 太极剑门
description: Retaining the signature features of the Millennium series and built on our proprietary, high-performance engine, the game effortlessly supports large-scale PvP battles involving thousands of players simultaneously. With hundreds of martial arts techniques, the game accelerates the training process.

name: GoblinChess
description: GoblinChess is a new type of chess game where we introduce ten different magical cards to the gameplay, and some chaos if you want. You can play online or against the built in robot.

name: Maid Mayhem
description: Maid Mayhem is a 2-4 player Action Party game where you and your friends take the role of a Big Buff Bald Maid and have to clean Grandma Twiggy's house at the same time! Take your trusty tools to clean and fight each other to make sure that you clean the most! Can you become THE BEST MAID!

name: DisGo
description: DisGo pits four friends against each other in a split-screen battle for the spotlight. Grab the golden disco ball to start playing your solo, but watch out, your friends run into you to steal your special moment. Use powers up to steal the spotlight back and be the king of the DisGo!

name: SEVENS
description: SEVENS is a competitive multiplayer card experience set in a dark underground club atmosphere. Sit at the table, read your opponents, disrupt their strategy, and fight to control the flow of the game — whether you're playing with friends, strangers, or bots.

name: Speedway Challenge 2026
description: A dynamic speedway game offering a realistic driving model, exciting competition, and multiple game modes. Develop your rider career, race on authentic tracks, and fight for victory in single-player and multiplayer modes. Experience the true thrill of speedway and prove your dominance on the track.

name: ChessBoyChess
description: chess...expect no more,no less.

name: Shrimpact
description: In Shrimpact you'll need to fight your friends! Use your boxing skills to punch eachother of the arena, but beware of the Clam who shoots out exploding pearls! Punch, throw and dash all you can in this chaotic battle!

name: Modern Durak
description: Card game following the rules of the Russian card game Durak

name: 游戏降临：我的系统异常（海外测试版）
description: 一款回合制策略消除游戏，女性向卡牌游戏。
developer: 青岛绛临网络科技有限公司

name: Cachuchin: By Waleles
description: A tactical turn-based board game where two players duel 1v1 using movement cards instead of fixed rules. Each turn, cards are exchanged, forcing constant adaptation as you maneuver your pawns to capture the enemy King or invade their Base before they outplay you.

name: Downfall MMORPG
description: Downfall MMORPG is an open-world sci-fi & fantasy MMORPG where magic and technology collide. Choose a faction, forge your own playstyle, and fight for control of a living world in massive PvP battles and endless PvE adventures.

name: Travellin Cats in Jingle Jam
description: Find 200 cats hidden around a festive holiday village and a winter wonderland in this FREE hand-drawn hidden object game by Travellin Cats - the original viral hidden cat game creator! Can you find them all?

name: Travellin Cats in Paris
description: Find 100 cats hidden in Paris, France in this cute hand-drawn hidden object game by Travellin Cats - the original viral hidden cat game creator!

name: Our Life: Beginnings & Always
description: A twenty-dollar bill, four summers, fifteen years, and a one of a kind life. Create an experience that’s all your own in this near-fully customizable visual novel where you grow from childhood to adulthood with the lonely boy next door.

name: Steam Engine Simulator
description: The Steam Engine Simulator shown on AngeTheGreat's YouTube channel.

name: Magic Archery
description: Train a commoner to become the greatest archer in this short incremental game! Increase your stats, gather wealth from quests, buy upgrades, and infuse your arrows with magic.

name: The Mr. Rabbit Magic Show
description: The incredible Mr. Rabbit invites you all to a mysterious magic show! Celebrate 10 years of Rusty Lake with a new free-to-play point-and-click adventure that promises to delight and… shock you with its sleight of hand!

name: The Supper
description: The Supper is a short adventure game about the darkest side of the human soul. Ms. Appleton was always a wellspring of kindness, until The Voice started talking to her.

name: Mizi NO!
description: In this free 2D puzzle game, you must reassemble broken objects that your cat has knocked over.

name: Cats and Seek: Osaka
description: Hey, do you have 5 minutes to spare? Let's play hide and seek with 100 cats in Osaka! 😻 Can you find them all?

name: Perspective
description: Perspective is an experimental platformer. The player avatar moves in a 2D space that transforms when the player changes perspective in 3D space. The player needs to use this mechanic navigate the 2D avatar to a goal in order to progress from level to level.

name: Slash/Jump
description: How do you platform if walking and jumping aren't an option? With a sword of course! Bounce and slash your way through this short and sweet, uniquely controlled precision platformer!

name: The Expendabros
description: The Expendabros have assembled and set their sights on the forces of ruthless arms dealer Conrad Stonebanks in the forests of Eastern Europe.

name: Outcore: Desktop Adventure
description: All you wanted was a nice game. But now you find yourself opening Windows apps like Paint & Notepad to solve puzzles, and searching for files on your computers that you didn't put there... Who is she? Why did she appear on your desktop? Let's dive into her memories and find out.

name: Iron Snout
description: Iron Snout is a fast, colorful and brutal fighting game in which you will be helping a piglet fight for its life against hordes of wolves.

name: Virtual Cottage
description: Virtual Cottage gives you a comfy place to rest and be productive without any distractions. Open the game, set yourself a goal and enjoy the atmosphere.

name: SuchArt: Creative Space
description: Paint on any surfaces with numerous tools in Creative Space — a free sandbox version of SuchArt: Genius Artist Simulator. Create masterpieces, complete commissions, and decorate your studio in the most advanced artist sim!

name: Gravitas
description: Gravitas is a short first-person puzzle platforming game that transports you to the Gallery of Refined Gravity. Manipulate gravity and the gallery itself to prove yourself a pupil worthy of the Curator’s masterwork.

name: Bloody Hell
description: A short but sweet game about an Angel on a Bloody Bullet-hell mission to kill Satan! Dash, Double Dash, Grapple & Blast your way through Hell to fulfill your Holy Mission. Will you be able to kill Satan? Or will you fail to master your abilities and DIE in this BLOODY HELL?

name: Alpaca Stacka
description: A 3D adventure platformer where you play as a kind alpaca dedicated to helping their animal friends.

name: Snake Force
description: Snake Force is an alternative top-down shooting game inspired by the classic game Snake. In this game, you’ll rescue your bros and fight along side with them. You and your bros will stand in a line, and shoot at the same point. Keep the shape of your squad, because bullets hurt whatever they hit.

name: Tukoni: Prologue
description: Tukoni: Prologue is a point-and-click puzzle adventure, based on a series of award-winning books by the Ukrainian artist Oksana Bula. Play as Tukoni, the forest spirits, as you meet unique characters, solve captivating puzzles, craft new items, and explore a magical world filled with kindness.

name: Princess Remedy in a World of Hurt
description: Remedy, a recent graduate from the Saturnian healing school, must descend to Hurtland and use her powers to heal everyone from stray ducks to dark lords, and finally cure the ailing Prince Hingst. It's a short, whimsical adventure with plenty of heart(s).

name: Pages of Time: Prologue
description: Pages of Time: Prologue is a 2D platformer puzzle game. Play as the witch who controls the magic of time, in a beautiful and magnificent magic academy, utilize the skills of recording and rewinding time, solve all kinds of puzzles, and look forward to the adventure of the future.

name: Swallow the Sea
description: You are a lowly egg cell on a journey through a swollen sea of strange and humanoid fish. Prey on smaller life and growing larger and stronger to perhaps someday be born.

name: My Sticker Book
description: "I can't sleep." A cute and possibly just a little bit scary puzzle platformer game. Move stickers to the right positions in order to get rid of the monsters and complete the sticker book.

name: 永冻之壳 The Shell of Permafrost
description: A girl, draped in mystery and chased by an evil fate, escapes from a frozen land. Now, a year later, with her memory gradually returning, she is forced to make an important decision.

name: NOeSIS02_羽化
description: A spirit trapped in the mirror, a girl restrained by her elder sister, a younger sister suffering from serious illness.The second wave of NOeSIS and a story of troubled girls and boys.

name: 旅燕归航 Swallow Homing
description: Space opera is a love letter written by humans to the stars.

name: DOTOKOI / 像素男友
description: 高中2年级的主人公，新学期转学到了新的学校。在兴奋地跑向新学校时，在路转角撞上了一个会说话的■物体。主人公被施了一种「帅哥的分辨率会变低的诅咒」。

name: 坦率的小红帽和爱说谎的狼
description: 温馨而有趣的短篇剧情游戏，讲述了可爱小红帽与笨笨狼少年的森林冒险故事，总计4种结局，不含黑暗成分哦（笑）

name: 异化之恶〇Abnormal Treatment
description: Strange events occur at a sanatorium for those with unusual abilities. Follow clues, solve puzzles, and uncover the truth. What will be released when all secrets are revealed? Goodness? Or… pure ”EVIL”?

name: 英雄黄昏-文字三国志&曹贼模拟器
description: 这是一个独属三国玩家的幻想世界，新奇独特，内容丰富。你将扮演穿越者，在三国中自由实现各种幻想，体验别样乐趣，也可轻松挂机。但本作是纯文字形式，没有精美画面、上手略有难度，由一个业余作者凭热爱独立开发。如有任何反馈，欢迎随时联系作者。

name: Travellin Cats in Christmas
description: Travellin Cats in Christmas is a FREE hidden object game in which you must find 100 cats hidden in a festive, hand-drawn scene. Can you find them all? A game by Travellin Cats - the original viral hidden cat game creator!

name: Cats and Seek: Kyoto
description: 👋 Hi folks! In this third series, we will explore Kyoto and greet the cats there 😃 😻 Let's play hide and seek with the cats in Kyoto! ❤️     Can you find them all? ❤️

name: The Lost Dachshund
description: Your granddaughter is coming over on the ferry from the mainland. You have promised her a puppy for her birthday– a dachshund named “Peanut”. But Peanut has escaped her pen and is free on the island. You must traverse the island and rescue the mischievous puppy, before your granddaughter arrives.

name: Black Gunner Wukong: Prologue
description: Black Gunner Wukong: Prologue is a TPS+ROGUE game where players will take on the role of Sun Wukong, using three heads, six arms, and six big guns to rampage through the US military base and rescue their master.

name: Plant Therapy
description: Get cozy in this plant collecting and decorating game! Build a beautiful indoor garden from the ground up in your New York City apartment.

name: Wretched Depths
description: Play as Sam and fish to your hearts content, sell fish you've caught, collect better gear, and use it to explore the depths of the mysterious lake, but be warned as no one knows what lies at the bottom. Wretched Depths is a PSX-style horror fishing game created by students at the University of Utah.

name: Slider
description: Slide chunks of the world to solve puzzles and help others. Control an ever-growing set of tiles and mechanics. Explore nine unique areas, unravel the mysteries of the universe, and reconnect the world -- one slider at a time.

name: STRAFTAT
description: STRAFTAT is a 1v1/2v2 ONLINE first person SHOOTER with quick rounds in over 350 MAPS ; Including all WEAPONS, proximity chat and 4 players FFA.

name: There Is No Game: Jam Edition 2015
description: A little game that’s not a game, winner of an old game jam that nobody’s ever heard of. So DON'T INSTALL IT!

name: Meteor 60 Seconds!
description: Meteor 60 seconds! is a simple, fun, comic-like action game that simulates your life if there were a meteor heading towards Earth and you had 60 seconds to live. Do anything you want to do with your last 60 seconds, even if it's illegal! What about planting an apple tree?

name: OnlyCans: Thirst Date
description: Feel The Fizz Inside You™ with the brand new Shize™ Collection!

name: Mitoza
description: It's not a game, it's a toy. Explore all cycles and prepare yourself to accept the inevitable effects of Mitoza.

name: PUMPKIN PANIC
description: COME TO THIS COZY FARM! Plant crops, take care of the plants, go fishing, or whatever you prefer, but have a good time! But be carefull, they say that strange things are happening in the area...

name: Coloring Game 2
description: Coloring Game 2 is a sequel of the existing color-by-number game which so many users have liked. The sequel features new options and images.

name: RED HOT VENGEANCE
description: He had one rule: No killing women or children. When a hitman is double-crossed by his employer, he brings forth a night of carnage and bloodshed.

name: Epic Battle Fantasy 3
description: Epic Battle Fantasy 3 is a silly turn-based JRPG, full of useless NPCs, rabid cats, childish humor, unreasonably large weapons, anime boobs, and other nonsense. And it's totally free!

name: DYO
description: DYO is a mind-bending cooperative platformer for one or two players where you can hop between two halves of a split screen.

name: Micro Platformer
description: A minimalistic platformer with a 1x1 tileset. No enemies, no bullets, no lasers. Just sheer platforming.

name: Mushroom Cats
description: Mushroom Cats is a kind and sweet game in the point-and-click genre about Mushroom Cats that live on the magical Toadstool.

name: 垃圾桶军团
description: The pioneers have been salivating at your trash can for a long time! They have formed a garbage can army and are preparing to launch an attack on your home! Reasonably use your characters to resist the repeated attacks of the Garbage Can Legion! Or...... Join the Garbage Can Legion!

name: Ultra Fight Da ! Kyanta 2
description: Ultra Fight Kyanta 2 is a fighting game with a frantic pace and easy to learn controls. You can perform special attacks using single button presses! Fight in 2D battles across various modes using teams of hand-drawn characters.

name: FALLSTRUKTUR
description: It takes a while to go back to sleep, but inevitably, you return. To dream of the Fallstruktur.

name: Red Planet Farming
description: Become the first Agricultural Director of Mars in Red Planet Farming! This casual strategy game tasks players with producing enough food to feed a growing population of settlers on the red planet.

name: Ducks Can Drive
description: Ducks like to race, even in their own cars! Earn money by delivering food to fellow ducks in the city, then use this money to upgrade your vehicle. The better the vehicle, the better chance you have to win the race at the end of the day!

name: Sucker for Love: Prelude
description: Preform a series of scary rituals to win over an eldritch cutie and win a smooch!

name: Breeze
description: Breeze, a point&click PC game with heart-warming story, lovely art style, and healing experience.

name: Monster Girl Island: Prologue
description: Dragons, slimes, giant bugs, centaurs and more. This island is full of monsters and they all are... Oddly attractive!? From Elves to Kitsune; from Mermaids to Androids; myths and science fiction suddenly become a reality as you find yourself in this mysterious island. Will you uncover its secrets?

name: Bitburner
description: Bitburner is a programming-based incremental game. Write scripts in JavaScript to automate gameplay, learn skills, play minigames, solve puzzles, and more in this cyberpunk text-based incremental RPG.

name: We Become What We Behold [Fan-Made Port]
description: a game about news cycles, vicious cycles, infinite cycles

name: Neon Beats
description: Beat your best scores in Neon Beats, a 2D platformer game with rhythm based levels!

name: MANDAGON
description: Explore Mandagon, a world inspired by Tibetan theology and philosophy. With a focus on life and death, discover what it means to make a true sacrifice . . .

name: How Fish Is Made
description: Are sardines trustworthy? Are you? Do you want to be? How Fish is Made is a janky little jaunt through the world of surrealist storytelling. Now featuring a Katamari-like DLC!

name: Samorost 1
description: Explore the beginnings of the Samorost series in the space gnome’s original bite-sized adventure, formerly released in 2003. Now with remastered sounds, enhanced graphics, and new music by Floex.

name: BirdGut
description: BirdGut is a hand-drawn 2d puzzle-platformer from the perspective of an outcast bee who gets eaten by a bird, and discovers that the bird's internal organs are not organs at all, but facilities in which the consumed insects are brainwashed and enslaved. Experience this bizarre one-man project for yourself.

name: I Wanna Maker
description: I Wanna Maker is a precision platformer with a robust level editor and online level sharing, based on I Wanna Be The Guy fangames. Create complex levels using a variety of objects, a powerful events system, and customizable visuals. Browse levels online, take on challenge modes, and more!

name: Floating Point
description: Floating Point is a peaceful, free game about using a grappling hook to swing yourself gracefully through randomly generated spaces. The only objective is to collect points, and the only thing that increases your points is swinging swiftly, smoothly and elegantly without hitting anything.

name: Island Saver
description: A group of amazing islands need your help! Horrid plastic waste has washed up and you need to sort it out with your trusty Trash Blaster! But look out for the Litterbugs. They love mess and they’re out to muck things up.

name: The Good Time Garden
description: Explore a throbbing pink world full of strange naked creatures to gather food for your friend in this short, surreal experience.

name: Blood Spear
description: Blood Spear is a unique ranged action-adventure student game in which you play as a demonic spear. Emerging from a deep slumber, you are thirsty for blood. Throw with precision to impale and defeat powerful foes inside grandiose environments where a long-coveted power lies.

name: OH MY GOD, LOOK AT THIS KNIGHT
description: Grab your shiny helmet and trusty sword, gather all the valor and honor you have, and show everyone, what being the true knight actually means!

name: Sprout
description: Embark on a casual, botanical-puzzle-adventure. Make friends, learn new skills, solve puzzles, and become the mighty oak that you were always meant to be.

name: NERTS! Online
description: NERTS! Online is a fast-paced competitive solitaire game for you and up to five of your friends, played the same way we play it at the Zachtronics office!

name: Coloring Game 3
description: Coloring Game 3 is a new paint-by-number game which has already won hearts of numerous players. Now the game offers new difficulty modes.

name: Touhou Fantasia / 东方梦想曲
description: This is a fan-made Touhou shmup with one single stage, similar to the extra stage of official Touhou games. This game has an auto dodging system, which gives you a choice to ignore all the danmaku and only focus on the story.

name: 狐の旅路
description: The white hair fox girl, Shirakami Fubuki, will take an adventure in a different world with her companions.

name: Khimera: Destroy All Monster Girls
description: Play as Chelshia the chimera in this platforming beat-em-up adventure into the wonderful world of monster girls!

name: Jigsaw Puzzle Dreams
description: Beautiful Multiplayer Jigsaw Puzzle game where you can design the room you play in!

name: High Entropy: Challenges
description: Use computers (via GUIs or the command line), unlock doors, crawl through vents, fight enemies head on or find other ways to neutralize or avoid them...

name: Tag: The Power of Paint
description: The world is your canvas in this innovative first-person puzzle platformer. Tag walls and other surfaces with different colors of spray paint to reveal new ways to navigate each level, including bouncing off, sliding across, and sticking to the surfaces you paint.

name: 群侠传，启动！
description: 开源武侠RPG开发框架，并包含样例游戏“渡城残魂传”：你将扮演灵魂穿越附身于小乞丐的莫桥山庄掌门人“莫穿林”，解开自己死亡之谜。

name: Owinka Shooter
description: Owinka Shooter throws you into an action packed mad-dash through an evil facility. Get ready to fight for your escape!
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: Shepherd of Light
description: Shepherd of Light is a student made game where you control a young shepherd who loses his sheep, and must brave a wolf-infested forest to get them to safety. Rescue sheep with different special abilities and direct them to solve environmental puzzles.
publisher: John Paul the Great Catholic University

name: FIND ALL: Christmas
description: What's that ringing filled the air? A wonder is coming! Santa has once again received many letters of wishes. The production conveyor have started! The Christmas season is upon us! Find 150 different items to give presents to everyone!

name: 你画我拼You draw I puzzle
description: "You draw I puzzle" is an interesting drawing Mosaic casual play, you can drag the graphics fragment to spell out the complete picture, can also draw the work that you like, cut into interesting fragments, let other players challenge your imaginative design. Have a good time!
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: Kintsugi
description: Accompany Kyō, a young apothecary, on his journey to repair a world shattered by mankind and uncover the origin of his newfound golden powers.

name: Blobun Mini
description: You are a blob bunny. Your goal? Touch every tile! Enjoy 60 bite sized puzzles across 5 different worlds in this casual puzzle game.

name: Where We Went
description: Where We Went is a narrative driven puzzle game. Step into the role of a mysterious character that can control ancient guardians to solve puzzles. Uncover the story behind your visit to the tomb and the reason for its existence!

name: A MIRROR PUZZLE
description: "A MIRROR PUZZLE" is a puzzle game. Players will play as a water droplet spirit, through the use of various magic mirrors to control the symmetrical growth of plants or the position of certain scene elements change, overcome numerous difficulties, and finally reach the destination

name: The Chef's Shift: First Course
description: A fast-paced typing game in a restaurant setting, where you’ll both cook & serve food to hungry customers, all done by TYPING. Play through the Italian restaurant and get a taste of The Chef's Shift!

name: Clam Man 2: Open Mic
description: OPEN MIC is the free prologue to the upcoming Clam Man 2: Headliner - a narrative adventure RPG where you escape your boring desk job to become a comedian!

name: Where Jellyfish 水母在哪里
description: Search for 100 Jellyfish. A carefully hand drawn 4K scene filled with cute characters. The process is short and won't take up too much player time. You can choose your favorite dyeing for the convenience of color blind players. Extremely easy to achieve.

name: SLUDGE LIFE: The BIG MUD Sessions
description: Munch down a bite-sized SLUDGE LIFE experience in this free self-contained interlude.

name: Just Hit The Button
description: Hit the button to win. The simplest game ever.

name: Elong Plug
description: Play as an elastic plug trying to become as long as LORD ELON. Use your climbing, dangling, and stretching skills to collect coins and buy length upgrades. Will LORD ELON accept you?

name: SWOLLEN TO BURSTING UNTIL I AM DISAPPEARING ON PURPOSE
description: SWOLLEN TO BURSTING is a weirdo RPG in which something is very wrong. A flying saucer has crash landed in town, but it's Thursday so you have to go to work at the post office.

name: Lords Of The Lockerroom
description: In this 3D physics based "fighter", take control of Aniki, Kazuya, Obama, and the rest of the cast as you duke it out in famous gachimuchi locations to see who's really the boss of the gym!
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: BROK the InvestiGator - Prologue
description: The very first PUNCH & CLICK! Brok is an innovative adventure mixed with beat 'em up and RPG elements. In a grim world where animals have replaced mankind, what kind of detective will you be?

name: 東方眠世界 ~ Wonderful Waking World
description: A simplistic, dynamic Touhou fangame bullet hell shmup with a pixel art esthetic. Shoot down your enemies and dodge your way through an incessant barrage of projectiles!

name: White Mourning: Museum In Pale
description: White Mourning: Museum In Pale is a fan game of Disco Elysium, based on White Mourning (the DE fanart book). You can wander around as a pixel RPG character. Meet with familiar people, review your familiar past, and collect all kinds of artwork.

name: Memoir
description: A short memoir of first love.

name: Life After Magic
description: Can you save magic before the clock strikes midnight on New Year’s Eve? Life After Magic is a queer, retro visual novel that follows jaded ex-magical girls as they reconnect, deal with young adulthood, and face off against one last threat before Y2K hits.

name: からぱりうぉーず
description: "Colorful Party Wars" is a RTS (real-time simulation) game based on "Colorful Party" (a.k.a. "Color-pari") the group in the virtual reality social game VRChat ! Select your favorite club and prove you’re the best to the rest of the members in Color-pari!

name: Monkey GO Happy
description: The original 5 Monkey GO Happy games have been compiled into one great app.

name: ChronoBreach
description: A deadly factory surrounds you. The manipulation of time is necessary to escape this underground facility. Use your wit, your laser blaster, and your time-warping abilities to face your demise head-on and triumph!

name: We're Tethered Together
description: Cast into an ancient crypt, survive the horrors that dwell below, and ascend from despair with your unexpected companion in this short 2D puzzle platformer. Take risks to evade the petrifying gaze from beyond the dark.
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: Dream on
description: Dream On is a very short, atmospheric walking simulator (5-10 minutes) about making a wish. Walk through a symbolic dreamscape, explore your thoughts and feelings, and make a quiet, meaningful choice at the end of the journey.

name: Schwarzerblitz
description: Schwarzerblitz is a love letter to '90s 3D low-poly fighters, featuring 28 playable characters, more than 30 stages, ring out mechanics, classic arcade endings, and a complete story mode. Steel your fists and ride the lightning!

name: Time Thief
description: Time Thief is an action adventure game where leaving your village makes the clock tick. Manage your time to stay alive, stealing seconds from creatures around its overworld with your sword.

name: Imitosis
description: A free 5-minute visual novel. A security concern demands your attention.

name: Witch You Want
description: Help this girlfailure witch save her failing potion shop in this cute yuri visual novel!

name: InKing
description: is a fast-paced 2D top-down action game. Players take on the role of an ink bottle warrior on a journey to become the king of tools. Use your fast attacks, moves, and powerful skills to defeat the tools that stand in your way, prove that ink and pen are the best tools, and become the King of Tools.

name: Weird and Unfortunate Things Are Happening
description: Join Alicia as she tries to save her niece from a city warped and twisted by otherworldly beings in this eccentric RPG.

name: Abyss Manager Idle
description: This is a short idle tower defense game that players can complete to 100% in 2 hours.Abyss Manager is an idle tower defense game where players need to assign jobs to various characters, collect resources, recruit and train characters, and excavate more floors to unlock further mechanics.

name: Graveyard Girls
description: Graveyard Girls is a halloween-themed yuri visual novel about complicated grief and overcoming hardships. Collect Elle’s “scribbles” to learn about her struggles, befriend a mysterious girl, and have a conversation about death.

name: Picross for a Cause
description: Picross for a Cause is a puzzle game where you reveal pictures by using logic to fill in pixels. All proceeds are donated to the NAACP Legal Defense and Education Fund, Inc.

name: VTuber Connect
description: VTuber Connect is a love letter to VTubers as a medium. One that hides nothing, but embraces everything. Whether you’re a VTuber or a viewer, we all form connections in our own way. How will you connect?

name: Brick Breaker Maker
description: Brick Breaker Maker is a rich, element-based Arkanoid game in which you need to flexibly control the baffle to bounce the ball and break the bricks to win. The game provides level editor that can be shared in the workshop to interact with other players, which is full of fun and competition.

name: God Of Thunder
description: Action! Adventure! Puzzles! Corny humor! God Of Thunder is the full version of a 1994 shareware game that you've probably never heard of. It is now freeware, so have fun.

name: Panzer Arena: Prologue
description: Panzer Arena:Prologue is an experimental tank PvP game. Boost, drift and flip your way through any kind of terrain in order to destroy your opponents. Use several types of abilities and weapons and compete in multiple game modes.
notes: Not reviewed yet 💀 Dead game (no players ≥14d)

name: CatNab
description: The cat's outta the bag! That's why we're bringing a barrel. Compete for high scores by nabbing as many cats as you can.

name: Infinity Nikki
description: Embark on a cozy open-world adventure filled with vast landscape, mystical puzzles and unexpected platforming challenges. Dress up not just for style, but to unravel hidden mysteries, interact with a vibrant environment, and experience the freedom to explore at your own pace.

name: Magecraft: Spellbuilding
description: Craft spell cards, collect new effects, and build the perfect deck as you fight through rounds of turn-based combat. Survive randomly-generated dungeon layouts by countering enemy attacks with your own spells, and make the most of the powers and scrolls you pick up along the way.

name: Cats Visiting El Dorado
description: Feline explorers have overrun the lost city! Find 400 cleverly hidden cats across 5 lush scenes of ancient jungle ruins. A relaxing yet challenging hidden object adventure.

name: GunBlocks - Prologue
description: In this prologue you crash-land on a mysterious planet. In order to get your lost cargo back, use tetrominos, solve blocky puzzles, and get to know its not too friendly inhabitants.

name: Escape from Hornhead
description: Escape from Horn head is 3D horror game. You need to find the keys and potions before he catches up with you. Explore the rooms, look for objects and avoid the pursuer. Try to find the best way, remember the movement of the Horned-headed demon chasing its victim, that is, you.

name: Astra Hunter Zosma
description: A treasure-hunting RPG with a lifelong friend! Escape the Crescent Moon Tower and return to the surface world... and grab lots of treasure on the way!

name: Baldwin's Bear
description: It's the magic of a carnival through the eyes of a child! From a fishing pool to a bouncy castle to a ghost train, each minigame is unique from the last, and holds its own little tricks and secrets. Collect tickets as Baldwin to afford the teddy bear, or race a friend for it in versus mode!

name: A Date With Chester 2
description: It's been three years since your first date with Chester the Otter. It's your anniversary today, and you've both got surprises in store. Are you ready for a date that's truly out of this world?

name: Five Stages of Pink
description: Horror mystery about a boy who desperately wants a Normal life in the most abnormal city in the world. Help Timor understand his cruel life in this supernatural city while trying to survive one more day. In a universe where Sleep is an illness. This is a visual novel with point and click features.

name: Palm Cracker
description: Delve into a gripping world of puzzles, true ciphers on an old PalmPilot system. Will you uncover the Crypt Killer’s confession and bring him to justice, or will he escape the law?

name: That's Not How it Happened
description: Disaster! When the Turner family’s inn burns down, they must recount the events that took place leading up to its fiery end!

name: Eye 4 Eye
description: Embark on a mission to unveil the truth behind a missing daughter case. Utilize the search engine to gather clues and uncover the dark secrets of TempleTech. Experience a suspenseful journey through the eyes of Hazel.

name: 业火 Hellfire
description: “阿难，是等皆以业火乾枯，酬其宿债，傍为畜生。” 《业火Hellfire》是一款中国本土题材的剧情悬疑解谜游戏。 故事发生在一个夏秋之交，年轻的摄影师回乡探寻故人。但随着探查深入，深埋已久的回忆被悄然激起…… 题材取自铁链女和乌衣事件，部分剧情改编来自白茕《周娘娘》。

name: Loop-Loop DX
description: Far into the future, a galactic super prison known as "The Prisom" keeps the Galaxy's most dangerous criminals within it's colorfully crystalline walls. Escape this superstructure by blasting down prison staff, other criminals, and even... yourself.

name: Space Bear
description: Space Bear is a multi-choice text adventure typing game! Sort of. I mean, there isn't many actual choices, and the typing is more "mashing"...

name: 冬日树下的回忆AFTER
description: 本作讲述了原作《冬日树下的回忆》中“真结局”之后发生的故事。 《冬日树》系列是由制作人xwu创立的社团「午后零时」推出的免费原创视觉小说，并由其旗下小组『MagicaLuv』协助运营。

name: Z Rush
description: Z Rush is an exciting strategic 3D game where your task is to place zombies in such a way that they can destroy all the turrets on the level.

name: No More Future
description: In the last days of their life, a dying person takes one final gamble... No More Future is a linear Sci-Fi Visual Novel, where you explore a futuristic world as an android trying to rebuild their old life. In this strange journey, they'll question the very foundations of their life and their world.

name: Aliens After Ava
description: You are Ava, a survivor out in the wild in the midst of an alien invasion. Fight back as you dodge, jump, roll, and use advanced technology to navigate your escape across terrain and extraterrestrial foes!

name: Deepwell
description: Deepwell is a story-driven adventure game, about a small town surrounding a giant mystery hole.

name: 机械恋心
description: 当科技突破伦理的局限，当天才的火花和机械的纯洁相遇，当积久的矛盾与必然的巧合共鸣，不受祝福却被期待的恋爱就此展开......

name: A Random Maze 某个迷宫
description: 一个忘记自己姓名与过去的人，在突然出现的神秘人物的帮助下，从一个空无一人的医院开始探索自己的过去。只有取回真实，才能从这里离开，即使……真相不像你所期待的那样，他也依然盼望着他的未来。

name: Free Will
description: Free Will is a 2D psychological puzzle RPG where the puzzles happen outside of the game. Dig deep into the system code to fix the corruption, and uncover information that might be better off hidden.

name: Press Any Key
description: Just press any key.

name: FISHGUN
description: FISHGUN is a chaotic fish-person shooter where you feed your sentient gun random upgrades to defeat hordes of evil fruit.

name: The Dandelion Girl: Don't You Remember Me?
description: A short visual novel about a middle-aged man on his summer vacation, where he meets a strange girl who claims to be from the future. Adapted from a short story.

name: Dreamline 404
description: Thank you for calling the Dreamline Service Center. We are dedicated to providing you with the highest quality dream services. How may I assist you today?

name: Clockwork Cleanup
description: Clockwork cleanup is a auto-battler game where your actions are dictated by tiles of various shapes placed in a grid. Defeat waves of enemies to save the factory!

name: cityglitch
description: Fly across haunted cities, solve rooftop puzzles and light magical runes. Cityglitch is a shimmery pixel puzzler with simple movement and deep challenge.

name: G.I.R.L.S. will be Girls
description: A grid based tactical tower defense game set in a fictional Post Apocalyptic world where androids roam the deserted lands.  Inspired by the group ITZY and songs Girls will be Girls / Imaginary Friend.

name: Oneiro Man
description: Oneiro is an office worker who is forced to stay up all night writing reports to avoid losing his job. The game combines typing mechanics with various mini-games. It’s a 30-40 minute experience with multiple endings depending on your performance.

name: Rainbow Unicorn Dash
description: Collect your unicorn shoes to dash through enemies, gather hearts, unlock fun abilities, and climb the leaderboards!

name: TET
description: Prepare a meal for the Vietnamese Lunar New Year dinner. But hurry, your guests are arriving soon! A short hand-drawn experience full of delicious surprises.

name: Trolley Delayma
description: Top down puzzle game about manipulating the tracks to redirect the trolley to save the victims. Solve the trolley problem in various forms of tiny puzzles.

name: Light Maze
description: A simple casual game where you light up floor tiles in a level in order to go to the next level.

name: Berry
description: Berry is a short orthogonal 3D platformer about a tiny, blue spider. Gain new abilities, weave through projectiles, collect and purchase a variety of items, and combat various bosses in this tiny metroidvania adventure.

name: MindLoop
description: Collect clues, deduce the code, and defuse the bomb in 40 seconds.

name: Stellar Witch
description: "Stellar Witch" is a grid-dodge action game with inventory management. Become a star-powered witch on a journey to become the Grand Mage. Collect gold in battle, buy and place constellations, and use their powers and synergies to fight ever-stronger enemies.

name: The Legend of Lumina
description: A block pushing puzzle game with metroidvania style progression, set in a serene forest world.

name: The Palace on the Hill Prologue
description: A slice-of-life adventure game set in fictional 90s rural India. Explore ancient palace ruins, set up your garden, cook Indian food, run errands for quirky characters, and learn about your history by making art.

name: EXE.CUTOR
description: EXE.CUTOR is a game where you place data blocks to complete lines. Acquire various equipment and enhance your data blocks to build stronger lines and defeat virus hosts infesting cyberspace!

name: Salvo Shuffle
description: Salvo Shuffle is a bullet-hell roguelike that mixes turn-based and action-based combat.

name: Duel of games
description: In the real world, the Game of the Year is about who is more fun to play,while in the gaming world,the Game of the Year is about who can fight better.In order to compete for the title of Game of the Year,games transform into fighters and engage in combat.Duel of classic game protagonists,pvp/pve/eve

name: Hidden Things Beach Elves
description: Dive into a sunny beach in this cozy hidden object game! Rotate the endless scene, watch funny elves go about their day, and find over 130 hidden objects to the soothing beats of a lo-fi soundtrack. The perfect way to unwind and relax!

name: Stormworm+
description: Stormworm+ is a Fast-Paced Reflex-Driven Arcade Game backed with colorful visuals and an original soundtrack! Inspired by the arcade games of old, collect, grow and aim for the top spot on the leaderboards!

name: Ms.Director
description: Cameras and heads are rolling in this noir inspired RPGmaker horror game. Save the spectral starlets trapped in the deadly director's mansion, and escape without joining them in their fate.

name: Cateau
description: The award-winning game Cateau is a visually, musically, and narratively beautiful experience. Enter the enchantingly atmospheric streets of Paris, getting to know truly distinct characters while every choice you make, whether big or small, carries weight and consequence in this little adventure.

name: Cats vs Zombies II
description: Cats VS Zombies is a hidden object game – the player's task is to find cats hidden on the map and eliminate the zombies. The game is designed in a zombie apocalypse style, but with a touch of humor.

name: Kona & SnowRabbit: Pilot
description: Kona, an ice artist with a reputation for mischief, and Snowrabbit, a white-furred snow rabbit full of desire. After hearing the story of Aquus, the mermaid goddess, the two down-on-their-luck artists break into the monastery of Aquus, nicknamed "the sea on land," to make a statue of a goddess.

name: Dragon Spirits : Prologue
description: While constantly working on a video game without any rest, a college student who's about to graduate quietly slipped into slumber several times. In those lucid dreams, he found himself in the game he was working on, the fantasy world of Dragon Spirits.

name: Consumption Line
description: "Consumption Line" is a short, fully free, experimental indie game about the food industry, deceptive advertising and the downsides of modern life. A sarcastic 30‑minute experience designed to make you reflect, not grind.

name: Be Queen Bee
description: "Be Queen Bee" is an action-strategy game where you become the Queen Bee and command your swarm with pheromones. Defeat predators, seize flower fields to escape hunger, evolve your swarm with honey, and strategize in real time to secure victory.

name: ZACH-LIKE
description: ZACH-LIKE is a book of behind-the-scenes design documents from Zachtronics. The digital version of ZACH-LIKE contains the full contents of the book, a bunch of terrible games that Zach made before SpaceChem, and some prototypes and early builds of Zachtronics games, both released and... not.

name: KEEK
description: KEEK is a pixel 2D platformer that you could use a special force to change the dimension of objects. Overcome obstacles, disable traps, collect items and face the final challenge.

name: Elephant Rave 2
description: The rave goes on! 14 years after his first rave, the elephant has returned for monumental challenge: avoiding very, very deadly beams of light

name: Dodd Goes to the Museum
description: Explore Dodd's local museum in this short and sweet, casual and relaxing side-scroller adventure! Visit various exhibits within the museum's four wings and talk to various characters along the way!

name: Furriend
description: Help the lonely mage to spawn lots of cute Paw-friends! Furriend is a 2.5D isometric puzzle games that combines connect the dot + merge mechanics.

name: Pair-a-Site
description: Welcome to Pair-a-Site, the dating website of the future! But you aren't here for love. Take on the role of an alien computer virus who can control the minds of anyone they attract! Your end goal? The president of the world.

name: DoraKone
description: Follow along with the adventures of Dulce as she finds new friends, new fun, and maybe even romance in the world of Dragon Connection, a hot new augmented reality mobile game.A, short, sweet free all-ages GxG visual novel featuring cute girls, friendship, and romance!

name: Flappy Souls
description: A mix of Flappy Bird and Dark Souls

name: Backworlds
description: Backworlds is a multi-dimensional puzzle platform game in which you explore by painting. Solve environmental conundrums by using each world’s physical properties to your advantage, and use your own creativity to craft original solutions to the game’s puzzles.

name: ColorCoordination
description: ColorCoordination is a puzzle game where you match colored blocks and spaces by moving them in unison. Explore deep, philosophical topics with your AI Assistant "CoCo" and discover more about its purpose - all while solving a myriad of colorful brainteasers!

name: Fart Game
description: In this hilarious and challenging game, it's all about holding in your fart until the perfect moment! Time and manage your farts wisely, because the more you let slip, the more aware your colleagues become.

name: Ultreïa: Prologue
description: A little robot becomes a pilgrim and crosses a wild post-apocalyptic world to find the meaning of life.

name: La Rana
description: In La Rana, players explore the lost Rain Temple of Rana. Play as a small spirit frog who is the temple's last remaining caretaker. Traverse its grand chambers and winding passages to restore its former power and revive your fellow frog spirits along the way.

name: A Book of Beasts and Buddies

name: Retrocycles
description: Race. Do not crash. Trap your enemies. Enter the maze. Dominate the zone. DO NOT CRASH.

name: The Longest Walk
description: The Longest Walk is a deeply personal biographical walking-simulator game about my father's experience of living with depression.

name: Little Green Girl
description: One day the protagonist meets an alien girl and the story turns...

name: Looking For Cats In a Badly Drawn Forest
description: Look around the house, mountain peaks and forest to find 300 cats hidden in the most unexpected places!

name: Dear Devere
description: A romance/mystery visual novel set in 1930s Scotland, told through a letter correspondence.

name: Life Tastes Like Cardboard
description: A game about boredom and self-pity. It's about myself mostly. You walk around and press the 'interact' button. Sorry for making this.

name: Trust Me, I Nailed It
description: <Trust Me, I Nailed It> is a turn-based strategy game where you edit video clips to make a screwed up warrior into a monster-slaying legend. Edit, stitch, and fake your way to epic battle videos. Make every fight look like a glorious win.

name: Legend of the Outlaw Mage
description: Become the Outlaw Mage, wreaking havoc as you pursue the one who wronged you, casting and blasting your way in this Cowboy-Fantasy-themed 3rd-Person Action RPG.

name: TANKS
description: TANKS is a fun game for one or two players where your goal is to protect the base and to destroy all the enemies. Beautiful pixel graphics, music and sound will let you feel the atmosphere of old school gaming.

name: Cursed 2

name: Fox! Hen! Bag!
description: In this short first-person adventure game, you have to bring your friends over to the other mountain by using a tramway car. But beware! Each friend has their own agenda. You have to talk to them to decide which order they should be moved in. Based on a classic riddle.

name: Prologue for a Vacant Kingdom

name: Blood Orange: Definitive Edition

name: Stillwater

name: Floodcore

name: The Pulse of Evil

name: Ardor

name: FACE LOVE: Face Designer

name: Chill Drive

name: Void Pyramid

name: Woodways

This is a free-to-play prologue version.
